task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 04-6-026 Execute printhead calibrations [Special Tests]

section.title: Function

note.p: On the operator panel tap on the [Output] icon. Make sure [Wind the output] is set to [No].

section.p: The media thickness is shown in the screen.

note.p: When using the Service tests media profiles this value might differ from the set value in SDS 25-1-00x once a media calibration via the UI has been performed.

section.p: Double check that SDS 25-1-00x reflects the media thickness of the media in case of doubts. Despite the different value in the SDS screen, the calibration will use the correct media thickness.

section.title: Description
section.p: This special test is a shorter version of the printhead calibrations that can be started from the printer operator panel.

li.p: You need a white, smooth, opaque media of at least 50 inch (1270 mm) wide for this test. Otherwise the test will not start!
Check the media thickness and press Continue.

note.p: In case calibrations fail due to a not replaced printhead that still is good enough this test can be done with that printhead disabled with SDS test 04-6-012 (first start in Zero SDS)

section.p: After the calibration, go to the Error history screen and check if one or more of the following warnings occurred during the printhead calibration:
Only check for warnings on NEW installed PHs. (Possible warnings on older PHs can be ignored).
If warning(s) occurred on new PHs, repeat the printhead calibration.
If after a retry still warnings occur, execute 3x SDS 07-6-002 with a “Powerful pressure pulse”.

note.p: The Y-calibrations are necessary after this special test.
